Theory cost: nested for over n is quadratic O(n²).

for r in regiones:

exercises.code:
nombres = ["Ana", "Luis", "María"]
edades = [30, 25, 40]
for nom, edad in zip(nombres, edades):
    print(f"{nom}={edad}")
print(list(zip(nombres, edades[:1])))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory zip silent truncate; show short zip with edades[:1].
Demo zip_strict + tests DESALINEADO then OK.

exercises.code:
lines = ["r1", "r2", "", "r3"]
i = 0
out = []
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    i += 1
    if line == "":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)

intentos = 0
MAX = 3
while intentos < MAX:
    intentos += 1
    print(f"intento {intentos}")
print("done", intentos)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: increment inside loop; 3 attempts + done 3.

exercises.code:
cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    print(job)
    if job == "job2":
        print("PAUSE")
        break
print("rest", cola)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: rest ['job3'] after break on job2.
Demo continue empty lines; only Lima and Cusco.

exercises.code:
codes = [200, 200, 500, 200]
n_ok = 0
for code in codes:
    if code >= 500:
        print("STOP")
        break
    print("ok")
    n_ok += 1
print("n_ok", n_ok)

buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    line = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if line == "END":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: break on END; guard i>10; result ['a','b'].

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if not n_total:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))

nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
cuadrados = [x * x for x in nums]
pares = [x for x in nums if x % 2 == 0]
print(cuadrados)
print(pares)

rows = [{"status": "reject"}, {"status": "accept"}, {"status": "reject"}, {"status": "review"}]
print(sorted({r["status"] for r in rows}))

rows = [{"id": "C1", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C2", "status": "reject"}, {"id": "C3", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C4", "status": "reject"}]
by = {r["id"]: r["status"] for r in rows}
rejects = [r["id"] for r in rows if r["status"] == "reject"]
tasa = len(rejects) / len(rows)
print(by)
print(rejects, tasa)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: by id dict; tasa 0.5 with C2,C4.

exercises.code:
vals = [2, -1, 3]
s = 0
for i, val in enumerate(vals):
    if val > 0:
        s += val
    print(i, val, s)
print("final", s)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints final s=5; print i,val,s each step.

exercises.code:
sts = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
n_reject = 0
for s in sts:
    if s == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
n = len(sts)
print(n_reject, n_reject / n)
print("Nota: O(n) basta para la tasa; no hace falta contar pares O(n²)")
